character.name: LingShuang
character.prompt:
Tactics Ogre Let Us Cling Together SNES style chibi ally pegasus knight lance fighter, western fantasy,
semi-chibi proportion, slender athletic build, graceful alert poised stance, tactical silhouette,
young woman early 20s with sharp focused face,
shoulder length pale pink hair tied at the back of head with a single white ribbon, long bangs framing face, head bare,
light silver chest plate over white tunic and blue knee-length skirt with armored side panels,
blue half cape pinned at left shoulder flowing behind,
slim silver pauldrons, silver greaves over white boots, white leather gloves,
long western steel cavalry lance held vertically in right hand, lance as tall as her body,
pale pink hair drawn IN FRONT OF and OVER the blue half cape,
no helmet,
16-bit SNES pixel art, muted earthy desaturated palette, hand-painted dithered shading, sharp readable silhouette
